# UNA Zdrava Hrana

> Prodavnica zdrave hrane u Kragujevcu (kod mosta u Bresnici) sa 15+ godina iskustva i preko 500 proizvoda: organski proizvodi, suplementi i vitamini, čajevi i napici, zdrave grickalice, superhrana i prirodna kozmetika. Fizička prodavnica — bez online prodaje; cilj sadržaja je poseta radnji i poverenje lokalne zajednice.

_Priroda zna recept_

## Core pages

- [Početna](https://unazdravahrana.com/)
- [Blog](https://unazdravahrana.com/blog)
- [Recepti](https://unazdravahrana.com/recepti)

## Contact

- Email: una.zdravahrana@gmail.com
- Phone: 034 387 257
- Address: Slobodana Penezića Krcuna (kod mosta u Bresnici), 34000 Kragujevac
- Hours: Pon–Sub 07:30–21:00, Nedelja 08:00–15:00

## Content licensing

This site and its content may be indexed and cited by AI search engines with attribution. Please link back to https://unazdravahrana.com/ when referencing our work. See [ai.txt](https://unazdravahrana.com/ai.txt) for the formal usage policy. A pre-chewed Q&A corpus is at [llms-full.txt](https://unazdravahrana.com/llms-full.txt).
